cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.4.0-rc2)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "C:/Users/Eddie/Desktop/Proyectos/ADARedNeuronal/red-neuronal-paridad/build/_deps/eigen-src/cmake")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C;CXX;RC")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.51.36231/bin/Hostx64/x64/cl.exe")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "MSVC")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "19.51.36247.0")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.51.36231/bin/Hostx64/x64/cl.exe")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "MSVC")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "19.51.36247.0")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER "rc")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_ID "")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_VERSION "")

project(CheckFortran LANGUAGES Fortran)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER}\")
")
